app_intro: Create or join a private league, set your directive, then launch the Grand Prix.
status_initial: Create your private championship, invite the drivers, then play each Grand Prix from the pit wall.
status_league_created: League created. Submit your race directive.
status_league_joined: League joined. Submit your race directive.
status_directive_locked: Directive locked. You can launch the Grand Prix.
status_saved_league_expired: Saved league no longer exists. Join the playtest again.
status_api_unavailable: API unavailable. Start the API server and retry.
status_request_failed: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
status_profile_created: Profile created. Save your recovery code.
status_profile_created_email_sent: Profile created. We also emailed your recovery code.
status_profile_code_missing: Profile code is not stored on this device.
status_ui_preferences_reset: UI preferences reset. Help panels and replay preferences are back to default.
status_recovery_code_requested: If a profile exists for this email, a fresh recovery code will be sent.
profile_error_email_required: Email required to recover your profile.
profile_error_email_invalid: Enter a valid email, for example driver@team.com.
profile_error_recovery_code_required: Enter the recovery code shown when the profile was created.
profile_error_recovery_failed: No profile matches this email and recovery code. Check both fields and try again.
profile_error_create_conflict: A profile already exists with this email. Use Recover profile with your code.
profile_error_create_failed: Could not create this profile right now. Check the email and try again.
status_qualifying_done: Qualifying run saved, your best time still stands.
setup_error_join_required: Enter a league code and team name.
drive_context_explainer: Study the current GP, set your directive, pick a card, then lock the plan.
race_phase_briefing_body: Check the track and forecast, then run a chrono with your current directive to improve the grid.
race_phase_adjust_body: Chrono {used}/{limit} is logged. Adjust the directive or lock the plan before the GP.
race_phase_locked_body: Plan locked. The grid is ready: launch the Grand Prix.
race_phase_finished_body: Review the replay and report, then move to the next race day.
command_hint_prepare: Lock your race plan to move into launch.
command_hint_ready: Everything is ready: resolve the Grand Prix.
command_hint_resolved: The race is reviewed: move to the next Grand Prix.
profile_intro: Save access first so your league, team, and recovery code stay linked across devices.
profile_logout_confirm: This will remove this profile and its saved leagues from this device. You can recover them with your profile code.
profile_create_hint: Create the access key for your future leagues.
preferences_reset_confirm: This restores help panels, replay speed, replay focus, and dismissed season recaps on this device. Your profile, leagues, and teams stay saved.
error_modal_body: The action could not be completed. The technical detail is hidden, but you can copy it for support.
plan_report_pending_plan_body: Send your plan to unlock the GP and fill this report.
plan_report_empty_body: This report is still empty because the Grand Prix has not been run yet. Launch it to fill the race phases, rewards, and key moments.
directive_plan_summary: {approach} pace, {preparation} tires, {pitStrategy} battery, {card}. Test it in chrono, then lock it for the GP.
directive_card_locked: Qualifying has locked the selected chrono card for this GP.
directive_card_consumption_help_body: A card selected here leaves with your plan. If it is used during the Grand Prix, it will be spent when the race launches.
directive_card_consumption_help_dismiss: Do not show this reminder again.
trait_brief_grip: Low grip makes rain and aggressive pace riskier.
trait_brief_overtaking: High overtaking rewards attack and launch cards.
trait_brief_energy: Low energy punishes late wear; reliability is safer.
race_forecast_info_body: Before launch, this shows the current forecast. After launch, this panel shows the weather used in the replay.
race_weather_info_body: The race weather is fixed when the GP starts. These are the conditions used by the replay.
qualifying_explainer: The car runs alone with the current directive and forecast. Your best time sets your grid slot.
qualifying_suggestion: Run a chrono before locking your directive to place your car on the grid.
chrono_report_history_empty: No chrono yet. Run one with the current plan to get a time, an estimated grid slot, and a comparison point before locking.
chrono_report_suggestion_first_run: Start with one chrono: it gives you a grid read before you spend the final directive.
chrono_report_suggestion_return_best: Your best lap came with {approach} pace and {preparation} tires. Reuse that base before locking the plan.
chrono_report_suggestion_compare_current: You changed the setup. Use one of the {left}/{limit} remaining attempts to check if this version is actually faster.
chrono_report_suggestion_weather: Rain is likely enough to test Weather tires before locking the final plan.
chrono_report_suggestion_speed: The current baseline is stable. Try Speed tires once to see if the car can gain raw pace.
chrono_report_suggestion_lock_best: No clear faster setup remains. Lock the best-known plan and protect the grid slot.
plan_recommendation: Plan read: {trait} leads this circuit, with {weather} forecast. {traitAdvice} {weatherAdvice}
plan_recommendation_circuit_grip: This circuit needs a stable car: corners and rain can quickly cost time.
plan_recommendation_circuit_overtaking: This track allows overtakes: an attacking plan can genuinely change the result.
plan_recommendation_circuit_energy: The end of the race matters here: protect reliability before chasing raw pace.
plan_recommendation_weather_read_dry: Dry track expected: you can chase speed if the rest of the plan stays controllable.
plan_recommendation_weather_read_light_r: Light rain is possible: keep control or Weather prep if you want to attack.
plan_recommendation_weather_read_heavy_r: Heavy rain is likely: stability and weather readiness should come before pure attack.
plan_recommendation_plan_safe: {approach} + {preparation} + {pitStrategy} + {card} secures the GP, but check you are not short on speed.
plan_recommendation_plan_risky: {approach} + {preparation} + {pitStrategy} + {card} can pay off, but the plan depends heavily on the chrono.
plan_recommendation_plan_high_upside: {approach} + {preparation} + {pitStrategy} + {card} targets a big result if the race window opens.
plan_recommendation_next_no_chrono: Run a chrono with this setup before locking: without a time, the plan is still a guess.
plan_recommendation_next_with_chrono: Compare it with your best chrono: if the gap stays high, change only one part of the plan.
plan_recommendation_next_locked: Plan locked: keep this read to understand the replay and prepare the next GP.
plan_recommendation_trait_grip: Keep the car stable before adding attack.
plan_recommendation_trait_overtaking: Leave room for an attacking setup.
plan_recommendation_trait_energy: Protect late-race endurance before chasing raw pace.
plan_recommendation_weather_dry: Speed prep is viable if the rest of the plan stays balanced.
plan_recommendation_weather_light_rain: Weather prep gives margin if the track turns damp.
plan_recommendation_weather_heavy_rain: Weather prep should anchor the plan.
plan_risk_strength_attack: more speed to attack and overtake
plan_risk_failure_no_chrono: no chrono has checked this setup yet
plan_risk_failure_grip: low grip can punish rain or corners
plan_risk_failure_pace: the plan may lack pure pace
plan_risk_band_high_upside: podium push if the read lands
engine_stat_pace_hint: Gains time when the car can run fast without being held up.
engine_stat_control_hint: Keeps the car clean through corners, traffic, and difficult sections.
engine_stat_reliability_hint: Reduces late-race losses when wear and incidents can get expensive.
engine_stat_weather_hint: Limits mistakes when the track gets damp or rain arrives.
engine_stat_aggression_hint: Helps attack and overtake, but makes the plan riskier if the car lacks control.
qualifying_confirm_body: This attempt uses your current directive and the forecast conditions.
directive_confirm_no_qualifying: You have not run a chrono yet. It matters: a chrono can improve your grid position and change your Grand Prix. Send the plan anyway?
directive_confirm_remaining: You still have chrono attempts left. Send the plan now?
directive_confirm_ready: Confirm this race plan before locking it.
directive_confirm_unused_card_warning: You have a playable card in inventory but no card selected.
directive_locked_body: This directive is sent for the current Grand Prix. Choices stay visible but cannot be changed.
launch_gp_confirm_body: Review the grid and conditions before sending the field away.
briefing_tip_prepare: Pick a directive that matches the track and forecast before launching the GP.
briefing_tip_resolved: Read the race recap, then start the next GP when everyone is ready.
weather_tendency_dry: Dry likely; rain can still arrive.
weather_tendency_light_rain: Rain possible around the race pivot.
weather_tendency_heavy_rain: Heavy rain risk is high, timing is not fixed.
approach_prudent_hint: Safer pace, better control and reliability.
approach_balanced_hint: No big weakness; useful when the forecast is uncertain.
approach_aggressive_hint: More pace, but more risk if the race gets messy.
preparation_speed_hint: Best for fast tracks and dry races.
preparation_reliability_hint: Protects you from late mechanical trouble.
preparation_weather_hint: Stronger if rain arrives, weaker if it stays dry.
pit_strategy_heavy_pack_hint: No stop, but the car is heavier early.
pit_strategy_standard_hint: One quick battery swap, the baseline call.
pit_strategy_mini_pack_hint: Two quick swaps for a lighter, sharper car.
card_none_hint: Save your special cards for a better opportunity.
card_rain_grip_hint: Pays off if rain appears around mid-race.
card_launch_boost_hint: Strong start, with reliability cost later.
card_urban_draft_hint: Pressure a chosen rival on urban sections.
card_final_surge_hint: Late push, better when you are outside the podium.
card_fleet_sponsorship_hint: Earns extra credits but sacrifices pace.
card_soft_tires_hint: More launch and attack pace, weaker late endurance.
card_qualifying_focus_hint: Improves your next chrono run, with little race value.
card_defensive_order_hint: Protects positions under pressure, but limits attacking moves.
card_adjustable_wing_hint: More attack on fast or urban roads, with a stability cost.
card_rain_mapping_hint: Better rain response, wasted if the track stays dry.
card_economy_mode_hint: Slower launch, extra credits for a strong finish.
card_pit_relay_hint: The pit wall steadies the car late under pressure.
card_calculated_attack_hint: Attacks only if another car is close enough.
replay_pace_marker_legend: dot markers are pace and race moments.
replay_player_marker_legend: orange dots mark your important moments.
replay_director_marker_legend: small white dots mark race director moments.
replay_weather_phase_legend: cloud icons map to the five race phases.
replay_finish_line_legend: the finish line marks the end of the replay.
replay_result_locked_body: Watch the replay or skip deliberately to reveal the payoff.
replay_director_qualifying_start_detail: The car runs alone and starts building the lap.
replay_director_qualifying_pace_detail: {team} settles the line and hunts for the cleanest split.
replay_director_grid_detail: Cars are staged before the field stretches into race pace; starting position now tests the plan's risk level.
replay_director_overtake_detail: {team} attacks {related}: P{from} -> P{to}. This is the payoff window for pace, card timing, or a risky approach.
replay_director_pack_detail: The front group is covered by {gap}; a small setup mismatch can still flip the order.
replay_director_weather_detail: Conditions shift to {weather}; weather prep and rain cards matter from here.
replay_director_pit_stop_detail: {team} stops for a quick pit battery swap; pit strategy is trading time now for cleaner late pace.
replay_director_final_detail: {team} controls the run to the flag; the final order is the plan's pace, reliability, and card timing added together.
restart_confirm: Restart this league from round 1? Teams stay joined, but points, credits, cards, directives, and GP history are reset.
next_gp_confirm_body: This opens the next Grand Prix and moves every player back into preparation.
finish_season_confirm_body: This closes the current season, prepares the next one, and shows the season recap.
garage_between_gp_hint: Buy a card as soon as you have enough credits, then use it in your next directive.
garage_shop_locked: Earn credits to unlock card offers.
garage_buy_confirm_body: This card will join your garage and can shape your next directive.
garage_buy_missing_credits: You do not have enough credits to buy this card yet.
garage_car_buy_body: This car costs {price} credits and will be selected immediately.
opponent_config_body: Descriptive comparison only: these are the plans locked for this Grand Prix.
result_replay_explainer: Relive the GP lap by lap: weather, pace, and key moments move the standings.
qualifying_replay_explainer: Relive this run lap by lap: line, forecast, and rhythm show how the time was built.
result_replay_axis: Front of the classification is on the left.
result_replay_empty: No replay events were recorded for this GP.
circuit_grip_hint: Higher means rain and corners punish the car less.
circuit_overtaking_hint: Higher means aggressive and offensive plans gain more time.
circuit_energy_hint: Higher means the car holds up better late in the race.
recap_verdict_cause_approach_gain_0: The {approach} approach changed your classification by {delta}.
recap_verdict_cause_approach_gain_1: {approach} was the most visible choice: {delta} in the classification.
recap_verdict_cause_approach_gain_2: {approach} fit this race well: a {delta} classification change.
recap_verdict_cause_approach_loss_0: The {approach} approach changed your classification by {delta}.
recap_verdict_cause_approach_loss_1: {approach} was the most visible choice: {delta} in the classification.
recap_verdict_cause_approach_loss_2: {approach} did not fit the conditions well enough: a {delta} classification change.
recap_difference_event_0: {event} on lap {lap}, in the {segment}, changed your classification by {delta}.
recap_difference_event_1: The key moment came in the {segment}: {event}, a {delta} classification change.
recap_difference_event_2: Lap {lap} mattered most: {event}, a {delta} classification change.
recap_difference_card_0: {card} triggered on lap {lap}, in the {segment}. That is when your card became useful.
recap_difference_card_1: Your key personal moment was {card}, triggered in the {segment} on lap {lap}.
recap_difference_card_2: {card} is the card that best explains this GP, with a trigger in the {segment}.
recap_difference_weather_0: The weather changed in the {segment}: {weather} arrived on lap {lap}, and the race changed with it.
recap_difference_weather_1: {weather} arrived in the {segment}. From lap {lap}, weather choices mattered more.
recap_difference_weather_2: Lap {lap} brought {weather}. That weather became the factor to watch.
recap_difference_headline_1: No single event dominated your log. {headline}
recap_difference_headline_2: The race stayed clean for you. {headline}
recap_directive_prep_good_1: Your {preparation} prep fit the race weather: {weather}.
recap_directive_prep_mixed_1: The weather was {weather}, so {preparation} was not the safest choice.
recap_directive_prep_mixed_2: With {weather}, {preparation} needed a card or approach to compensate.
recap_directive_card_hit_1: {card} had a visible effect on your classification: {delta}.
recap_directive_card_hit_2: {card} supported your plan: {delta} in the classification.
recap_directive_card_miss_0: {card} did not find a useful moment in this race.
recap_directive_card_miss_1: You carried {card}, but the conditions did not really help it.
recap_directive_card_miss_2: {card} barely mattered. Keep it for a race that fits better.
recap_directive_approach_gain_0: The {approach} approach changed your classification by {delta}.
recap_directive_approach_gain_1: {approach} moved you forward: {delta} in the classification.
recap_directive_approach_loss_0: The {approach} approach changed your classification by {delta}.
recap_directive_approach_loss_1: {approach} put you under pressure: {delta} in the classification.
recap_directive_approach_loss_2: {approach} did not hold for the whole race: {delta} in the classification.
recap_plan_no_reference: Analyzed plan: {setup}. No comparable opponent plan is available.
recap_lesson_card_0: Next race: {circuit}. If {focus} appears again, {card} can still be useful.
recap_lesson_card_1: {circuit} will highlight {focus}. Keep {card} only if that condition is confirmed.
recap_lesson_card_2: For {circuit}, check {focus} first. That should decide whether you use {card}.
recap_lesson_recover_0: {circuit} is next, with {focus} as the important point. Look for a reliable plan first.
recap_lesson_recover_1: For {circuit}, answer {focus} first, then add risk if the chrono allows it.
recap_lesson_recover_2: Before {circuit}, cover {focus} first. Gains come after that.
recap_lesson_prepare_0: {circuit} comes next. Build your plan around {focus}.
recap_lesson_prepare_1: For {circuit}, let {focus} guide your prep and card choice.
recap_lesson_prepare_2: Before {circuit}, check {focus}. It is the most useful clue for choosing your plan.
event_weather_change: The weather changes during the race
event_wrong_weather_bet: pays for the wrong weather call
report_clean_race: The race stayed clean and was decided by overall pace.
report_event_neutral: No position change, but the race rhythm shifted.
onboarding_profileCode_body: This code is the only way to recover your profile and linked leagues on another device.
onboarding_race_body: One GP starts with the forecast, five engine stats, and one simple loop.
onboarding_race_item_1: Pace, Control, Reliability, Weather, and Aggression tell you what your plan brings to the race.
onboarding_race_item_2: Run a chrono to place your car on the grid.
onboarding_race_item_3: Lock the plan only when you are ready to launch the GP.
onboarding_race_dismiss: Do not show this race intro again
onboarding_plan_body: Every choice changes your plan's five engine stats: Pace, Control, Reliability, Weather, and Aggression.
onboarding_plan_item_1: Approach mainly changes risk, aggression, and stability.
onboarding_plan_item_2: Prep and pit strategy boost some stats, but can weaken others.
onboarding_plan_item_3: Run a chrono before locking: the card travels with the plan if it triggers in the GP.
onboarding_plan_dismiss: Do not show this plan intro again
onboarding_garage_title: Use the garage for the next GP
onboarding_garage_body: Credits turn a good result into future options.
onboarding_garage_item_1: Buy cards that match the next circuit or forecast.
onboarding_garage_item_2: Saving credits is valid when the shop does not fit.
onboarding_garage_item_3: Team colors and name live in My team.
onboarding_garage_dismiss: Do not show this garage intro again
league_onboarding_step_1_title: You are your team's pit wall
league_onboarding_step_1_body: Each Grand Prix plays like a pit-wall call: read the circuit, anticipate the forecast, and choose what your team should prioritize.
league_onboarding_step_2_body: Start with a provisional directive. Then run chrono attempts to fight for a better grid slot before locking your plan.
league_onboarding_step_3_body: Approach, preparation, and card give your race its identity. The replay judges whether that choice really fits the circuit, conditions, and rivals.
league_onboarding_step_4_title: Race by race, build your season
league_onboarding_step_4_body: Results bring points, credits, and cards. Between GPs, use the garage to prepare the next move.
league_onboarding_dismiss: Do not show this league intro again
admin_body: Inspect profiles and leagues with a server-configured admin token.
admin_cleanup_confirm_prompt: Clean this selected test data set? Only clearly marked test data will be deleted.
admin_delete_user_confirm: Delete {email}? Their teams stay in leagues without a linked profile.
admin_inspection_banner: Admin inspection mode: read-only league context, no player claim loaded.
admin_error_unconfigured: Admin operations are not configured on the API.
status_admin_league_loaded: League loaded in admin inspection mode.
